What additional care is required ? 22 /c118Eat more food during pregnancy. /c118Eat more whole grains, sprouted grams and fermented foods. /c118Take milk/meat/eggs in adequate amounts. /c118Eat plenty of vegetables and fruits. /c118Avoid superstitions and food taboos. /c118Do not use alcohol and tobacco. Take medicines only when prescribed. /c118Take iron, folate and calcium
